creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204923
v0 (without PORTREVISION bumps)

GCC 9 recently (see ports r503247) had first release. While it'd take ~2 years for GCC 8 to reach EOL let's prepare in advance.

https://gcc.gnu.org/gcc-9/changes.html
https://gcc.gnu.org/gcc-9/porting_to.html
https://gcc.gnu.org/projects/cxx-status.html
